name: cover-generation-server
description: Lightweight HTTP service to generate blog cover images as SVG.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/createServer.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/index.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/exporter.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/templates/v1.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/templates/v2.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/shapeEngine.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/typographyEngine.js && node --check src/coverGenerator/utils.js
